limits: PI-3 live acceptance was not executed: no real Gmail polling, no real ClickUp task creation, no real /url or JD-builder run. ClickUp REST adapter is implemented and locally verified, but actual API calls remain L3/live external writes requiring owner approval, token configuration, and a test email.
The existing registration parser is intentionally reused and not extended; arbitrary non-Wanted/non-ClickUp posting URL registration remains PC-A4 scope.
